# Regression Discontinuity

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Sharp and fuzzy discontinuities

_To be added._

## Identifying the cutoff

_To be added._

## Estimation methods

_To be added._

## Validity checks

_To be added._

## Applications

_To be added._
